title: Chalie's True Weaponry
description:
A NEW MEGA UPDATE That Adds +100 Unique and Vanilla-Like Equipment;
- New Playstyles
- New Sets of Weapons/Tools
- Unique and Powerful Weapons
- Progression-Like Weapons
body:
# Chalie's True Weaponry
True Weaponry is a Brand new Update that expands A LOT on Weapons and Tools, way more than Minecraft would ever do. Adding a new Vanilla-like experience that gives Everyone more playstyles to play with, While being balanced with it's Progression.

![Intro Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36c18a7addd93c80e776c1385caff9aaca55a251_0.webp)
 
# VERY IMPORTANT

<details>
<summary> Step by step for Installation: </summary>
  
### 1. Click the **Download** Button

![TWRP Installing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/268cedb5142123b3dc487b25b665f684479bb12e.png)

### 2. Select the Minecraft **Version** and **Plataform**

![TWRP Installing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0708899a004f2595961c44518731288275d934d1.png)



<details>
<summary> For Data Pack Versions </summary>
  
### For Already Created Worlds:

1. Click on the Minecraft world that you'll like to add the Datapack to.
2. Click **edit** and **Open World Folder**.
3. Here, click the **datapacks** folder.
4. Now separately, go to your **Recent Downloads** (From your File Explorer or browser) where the downloaded Datapack is, and Drag and Drop it inside the **datapacks** Folder.

![TWRP Installing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893fdbe2961d2f72d0435ba1bb108c809794db7e.png)

### For New Worlds:

1. While creating a new World go to **More**.
2. Click **Data Packs** and **Open Pack Folder**.
3. Now separately, go to your Recent Downloads (From your File Explorer or browser) where the downloaded Datapack is, and Drag and Drop it inside.

![TWRP Installing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76952d44a1cbb9e73270408522259cf5c3d3c0aa_0.webp)



</details>

<details>
<summary> For Mod Versions </summary>
  
### For Mod
  
1. Press **Windows key + r** and type **%AppData%** exactly the same.
2. Click **.minecraft** and click your **mods** folder.
3. Now separately, go to your Recent Downloads (From your File Explorer or browser) where the downloaded Mod is, and Drag and Drop it inside.
4. Restart your game.


![TWRP Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a94ac32243189d4cec7a8a6d265a0ac15ccd003.png)

</details>


</details>

- True Weaponry **REQUIRES** it's own **[RESOURCEPACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/true-weaponry-resourcepack)** for All New Weapon Textures.
- Recommended to play without spoilers of Recipes, Mechanics or Abilities!
- Currently adding more content, translations and playtesting more versions!
- Beware that your crafting table WILL be flooded of new weapons and tools.


![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94cb7f09a82c9d7d675c8a1df4928877b94ea832_0.webp)


## Description

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5321e426575f4079c518752ae1b31faea6b7e66_0.webp)

## New Awakened Weapons Added:
_A new BROKEN tier of weapons. Can be made by dropping an End Crystal, a Block of netherite and a beacon combining it with a unique weapon_

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0312900e22a4df6572725ee660eb1c8f92873522_0.webp)


## New Set of Weapons/Tools Added:
_Every new set doesn't aim to change the usual wood to diamond progression but instead to add new niches or mechanics._

<details>
<summary> Copper Weaponry</summary>

- ### **Copper Weaponry**

The Copper Tool Set adds an oxidation mechanic, when in hand/offhand for a looong time, the copper tools will start to oxidize, increasing their stats and repairing instantly.

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34175ea38a529206b7cddde1cfc844f94f7b32aa.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Amethyst Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Amethyst Weaponry**

The Amethyst Tool Set adds a quick and reliable alternative to gold/stone tools, with increased attack speed, but veeery low durability.

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a820aecb7f894de8f8170cc39cadeccc510fa3.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Emerald Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Emerald Weaponry**

The Emerald Tool Set adds a rare chance for an emerald drop every time you kill a mob. Copies diamond stats with medium durability.

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36e7157e96cbe49e8f17b96437294647ef82748.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Ice Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Ice Weaponry**

The Ice Tool Set adds a momentarily strong but very brittle option, being faster than gold tools but even less durable than them. Made with the intent to add content for colder biomes.

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94bb17035bae2f5a951aaa4f06d7538a4c033907.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Coal Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Coal Weaponry**

Description WIP. 



</details>

<details>
<summary> Quartz Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Quartz Weaponry**

Description WIP.



</details>

<details>
<summary> Lapislazuli Weaponry </summary>

- ### **Lapislazuli Weaponry**

Description WIP.
 


</details>

#

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13df9efd9e039b91853e87924ff94be8f3e6486a_0.webp)

## New Weapons and Tools Added:
_Every weapon/tool has it's own wooden, stone, iron, golden and diamond variant._

<details>
<summary> Battleaxe </summary>

- ## **Battleaxe**

> A damage heavy weapon that's slower than an axe but has increased area damage.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09ccdd2d89e86e1a82cacc073342ae202e4473f4.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Spear </summary>

- ## **Spear**

> A range based weapon that offers a new playstyle to try and master.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f09447b8bdb2250cb274ae2c66cea2acd2197bba.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Scythe </summary>
  
- ## **Scythe**

> A new type of damage dealing hoe mainly to add a diffrent aesthetic for player to experience.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65f54f4d056816e31ce045a4342a2fdcf865ff9.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Poleaxe </summary>
  
- ## **Poleaxe**

> A long range heavy weapon also useful as a tool, gets a knockback buff when a shield is in offhand.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c188a641557cabacace6f7094b90a648197824df.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Katar </summary>
  
- ## **Katar**

> A short light weapon with less range, gets way faster when another katar is in offhand.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f13175c3b6f8a4ce2b58dcaeffb4765af8897b.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Chakram </summary>
  
- ## **Chakram**

> A light weapon that works as a tool, grants a speed buff and gets faster when another chakram is in offhand.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc089249bfc9a84431295108785be260409001c5.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Sickle </summary>
  
- ## **Sickle**

> A damage dealing hoe that grants you speed for a small time frame after every connected attack.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba3048ecd44fe2bc320d22da6fdb1e0d0ab2bab.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Katana </summary>
  
- ## **Katana**

> A rhythm based weapon that brings a new type of playstyle to experience. Recharges way faster every other connected attack.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13f843d2548a86f1f8a221dba1d2a85f7e3f8aab.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Saw </summary>
  
- ## **Saw**

> A light and rapid weapon meant for spam playstyles, deals less damage.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a56983d01602c099eb9c6aebf6931c7d4f74bef3.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Mace </summary>
  
- ## **Mace**

> A lesser version than the mace, still difficult to craft, made to be more accessible yet not so powerful.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2eb9d896c78f75aa8d785cf217edb82bbb8acc5.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Greatsword </summary>
  
- ## **Greatsword**

> A very heavy weapon with a very low speed attack, made to have the highest damage per attack.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8840c647e0f9e66a0554c58975970339e47b30eb.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Greatpickaxe </summary>
  
- ## **Greatpickaxe**

> A craftable upgrade to the pickaxe, gives more block range and durability.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5bfdeba12274ebc5bd83cf172d092dcd14c245.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Glaive </summary>
  
- ## **Glaive**

> A gimmick type of weapon that can hit beside and behind you every connected attack.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc8c1ae1b47cd5d2d9785e4003c90b978f765aa.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Finsbane </summary>
  
- ## **Finsbane**

> A gimmick type of weapon meant to combine the fishing rod with the common sword, meant for pvp playstyles and combos.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8cda77845f0372ca34f7d9e714bef8b10bd421a.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Crimson Sword </summary>
  
- ## **Crimson Sword**

> A normal sword that gives you regeneration while stacking damage.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de050c682868cbf3a114d2d89af6fd7c11009fbb.png)
</details>


#

![TWRP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b432c2215fff7587a41309b8778c95d024ec005.png)

## New Unique Weapons/Tools

_Unique Weapons don't have material variants and their power is in line within the progression of the game._

_(Will have to balance them in future updates.)_

<details>
<summary> Flower Sword </summary>
  
- ## **Flower Sword**

> A gimmick type of sword which spawns dandelions and poppys if there's any type of dirt around you every hit.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265cfb33ff9355c092d4309e2c12cd8e8a2059b7.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Absortion Sword </summary>
  
- ## **Absortion Sword**

> A normal sword with netherite stats that provides Absortion II every once in a while.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb078ead045f476aa9c333735ca776cada537271.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Sword of Undying </summary>
  
- ## **Sword of Undying**

> A normal sword with netherite stats that acts as a Totem of Undying.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92b893424e363bb2e9325e7bf4211701264a9cad.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Sculk Sword </summary>
  
- ## **Sculk Sword**

> A gimmick type of sword with diamond stats that gives Darkness I to the player/mob attacked.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9967b472243e656e1bbceee4e61effa5e7f79c49.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Enlighted Greatsword </summary>
  
- ## **Enlighted Greatsword**

> Desccription WIP

</details>

<details>
<summary> Wildfire Axe </summary>
  
- ## **Wildfire Axe**

> A heavy damage weapon with Fire Aspect embedded in it, when on your inventory you'll burn for much less time.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc5f0a195d90959028eece27a6b2cad4559b2e0.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Demoncore Mace </summary>
  
- ## **Demoncore Mace**

> An explosive version of the mace, be careful while using it, it's explosions may damage you. 

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ef2d1d2e1c494562db775f3aeabaff23c38e492.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary> Wither Scythe </summary>
  
- ## **Wither Scythe**

> A powerful weapon that gives extra speed and jump height, acts as a mace and has a wither inducing aura while stacking damage.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd3e8d55b1e99560a236d408f2595d2a851a7579.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary> Coldbite Greatsword </summary>
  
- ## **Coldbite Greatsword**

> A fast and powerful weapon that gives high Slowness to the mob/player attacked while stacking damage.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cef886eb34a019ac69c0ec3607a4958577cce322.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary> Void Sword </summary>
  
- ## **Void Sword**

> Created with very rare and end-game items, this sword is the final achievement.

![TWRP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f6bfb43065ee17d85d011a243732bc155565b4.png)
 
</details>
